labels.LAC_SR_AUTO_CONTEXT_LABEL: Form date, patient, requester, fixed category and FHIR status are derived automatically by the mediator; they are not stored as observations. IPS/supportingInfo is not used.

concepts.COUNTRY_OF_DESTINATION_4_DESC: Destination country selected from ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country list
concepts.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_5_DESC: Free text destination organization for the referral performer Organization

labels.LAC_SR_AUTO_CONTEXT_LABEL: Fecha del formulario, paciente, solicitante, categoría fija y estado FHIR se derivan automáticamente por el mediador; no se registran como observaciones. No se usa IPS/supportingInfo.

concepts.DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_5_DESC: Organización de destino en texto libre para construir performer Organization
